title: phlox cluteana
intro: Phlox cluteana, also known as the prairie phlox or Clute's phlox, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America, belonging to the phlox genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phlox cluteana include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, and its extracts have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy by making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its flowers, leaves, and roots, which can be used to treat various health issues.
